subject: Son Goten (Dragon Ball Super) — child anime IP character, energetic combat pose
description: A young child with spiky dark hair charges forward with both fists raised, body leaning into the motion. The art style and character design are consistent with Son Goten from the Dragon Ball franchise. His face shows a determined fighting expression. A golden ki aura crackles around him. He wears a dark martial arts gi. The background has warm orange-red energy bursts.
foreground: Young child with spiky dark hair, dark gi, fists raised, lunging forward with ki aura
